svg.title: Intelegrate.Demo K3s 1.31 — Cluster API map
svg.desc: Structural diagram of the Intelegrate.Demo K3s 1.31 cluster API groups, including K3s-native resources, Traefik ingress CRDs, and Prometheus Operator monitoring stack.
